Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Talos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos is Leah's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos is a Damascan royal Heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos carries a sword with a red blade which is an artifact of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos intends to remove Indirial before making a move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos is a character who acted like a proud big brother to Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Talos plans to assassinate the King during war preparations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Talos is the son of King Zakareth and is referred to as Heir Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Talos has curly golden hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Talos wears a black and red suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Talos claims to be the firstborn son of Zakareth the Sixth and Heir to the Damascan throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Talos and Lysander have been planning against King Zakareth for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Talos is someone whose activities are unknown during the King's absence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Talos is a Traveler of Ragnarus and can only Travel back to Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Talos is the royal Heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Alin may have to work with Talos for the attack on Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Talos is a unit leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Talos is a lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Talos wields a crimson blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Talos stepped out from a tent behind Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The battle erupted under Talos' command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah intends to look for Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Heir Talos has a rendezvous point.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Heir Talos was located in the Damascan camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Talos was waiting for the Grandmasters and appeared to be on the verge of death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Heir Talos fights with a jeweled staff to deflect his father's spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Talos raised his staff to focus behind the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Talos is a Ragnarus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Talos betrayed Zakareth by bringing a strike force from Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Talos's body lay on blue tiles with a livid red mark around his neck.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
